economic_notes: Five business entities accounted for by modified equity method: Ch-ihl-kway-uhk Forestry Limited Partnership (11%), Ch-ihl-kway-uhk Forestry Ltd. (12.5%), Ch-ihl-kway-uhk Tribe Society (11%), Centre Creek Limited Partnership (11%), Centre Creek Management Limited. Forestry and property rental operations in Chilliwack area. 20 member loans receivable for housing costs; 6 rent-to-own housing loans.
notes: Audit is qualified due to exclusion of budgeted information (not a going concern issue). Five GBEs accounted for by modified equity method. Deferred revenue of $438,823 relates to ISC Flood Mitigation Funding. Ottawa Trust Fund balance of $22,767 held by Government of Canada. No long-term debt on the First Nation's own balance sheet (Centre Creek LP has $832,394 long-term liabilities within the GBE). OSR calculated as total revenue minus ISC funding ($3,288,488) and other government transfers ($598,280 BC + $600,755 FNHA + $169,590 FNESC + $26,578 FNTC + $242,059 BC Revenue Sharing LP + $169,590 already included) — total government transfers estimated as ISC $3,288,488 plus other government per segment $1,107,900 = $4,396,388; OSR = $6,726,105 - $4,396,388 = $2,329,717. No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements provided.
